title: How Long Can Prices Keep FALLING?
description:
How Long Can Prices Keep FALLING?

Special Guest Ben Rabidoux- Founder of North Cove Advisors and Edge Realty Analytics.

A very deep dive on Canadian Real Estate Sales Trends & Price Expectations 

How long can prices keep falling?
How much lower can they go?
Will the number of homes sold keep falling?
What about Rents?
Will Immigration increase?
When is the Real Estate Recovery
We cover all this & more in an episode filled with facts

summaryLong: The video provides an in-depth discussion on the ongoing decline in Ontario and Canadian real estate prices, particularly focusing on the Greater Toronto Area and comparing it with markets like British Columbia and Alberta. It highlights key challenges including record lows in home sales, a significant oversupply in rental markets due to aggressive construction backed by government incentives, and systemic issues with immigration and refugee claimants affecting housing demand. The hosts emphasize the unprecedented drop in new single-family home starts and a potential construction industry slowdown, which, combined with political and economic uncertainties like rising oil prices, suggest that prices will likely continue falling before stabilizing. The discussion also touches on the social impact of high rents on younger generations unable to save for homeownership.
summarySocial: Ontario real estate prices continue to fall amid oversupply and tightening markets, with rental booms, construction slowdowns, and immigration struggles shaping the housing landscape. A challenging year ahead for buyers, sellers, and renters alike.
